## Meeting Purpose

[Review partnership progress and provide facilitated feedback after 8-9 weeks of collaboration between Marcel Santilli and his EA Alice.](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel needs more proactive calendar management and anticipation of his daily needs to reduce stress and avoid dropping important tasks](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Communication and feedback between Marcel and Alice need improvement, with more frequent check-ins and updates](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Alice has learned valuable skills (e.g., Atio CRM, invoicing) but needs to be more assertive in scheduling time with Marcel and reorganizing his calendar](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)

## Topics

### Calendar Management and Scheduling

  - [Marcel stressed the importance of thinking through his physical day, not just looking at calendar events](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Issues with back-to-back meetings and unrealistic scheduling given travel times and locations](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Need for better load balancing and anticipation of Marcel's needs (e.g., quiet spaces for demos, reliable internet)](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Alice should be more proactive in reorganizing the calendar, finding chunks of time for specific activities (e.g., prospecting)](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)

### Communication and Task Management

  - [Marcel has 119 unread Slack messages, indicating overwhelming communication](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Suggestion for daily briefs or voice notes summarizing Marcel's day and upcoming tasks](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Need for a centralized list of pending items Marcel is blocked on, with increased urgency for overdue tasks](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Alice should be more assertive in getting Marcel's attention for important matters](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)

### Proactive Support and Decision-Making

  - [Alice should take more initiative in responding to emails and making decisions when possible](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Examples: replying to availability requests, drafting emails, and creating SLWs](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Marcel encourages Alice to "go for it" and build trust over time to handle more responsibilities autonomously](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

### Business Growth and Challenges

  - [Marcel feeling overwhelmed due to rapid business growth](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Multiple responsibilities: legal matters, meetings, presentations, client acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Need for Alice to take on more administrative duties to free up Marcel's time and reduce anxiety](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

### Positive Developments

  - [Alice has created valuable resources like podcast drafts and email templates](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [Successfully closed a deal with AI without Marcel's direct involvement, demonstrating increased leverage](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a calendar review session to reorganize and optimize Marcel's schedule](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Implement regular "calendar calibration" meetings to stay ahead of scheduling issues](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Alice to be more forceful in scheduling feedback sessions and communication time with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Utilize Marcel's driving time for calls and updates (he had 6 hours of driving time this week)](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Marcel to add a requirement for mobile numbers in calendar invites to improve communication](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [Focus on reducing Marcel's anxiety levels and helping him feel more caught up with tasks](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Alice to provide daily voice notes or briefs summarizing Marcel's schedule and important tasks](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [Continue to build trust and autonomy, allowing Alice to take on more responsibilities over time](https://fathom.video/share/Aakyi7ptwSK3Rr1rfD34xzU1WQsxN7KW?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
